full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Structure the IEEE-format report to ensure all five rubric components are covered.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page IEEE-format report for a machine learning reproduction study. The report must cover: paper summary, reproduction setup and gap analysis, two ablation findings and what they reveal, failure mode and explanation, and a reflection. What section structure maximizes clarity and rubric coverage?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested the five-section structure (Paper Summary, Reproduction, Ablation Studies with two subsections, Failure Mode, Reflection) which maps directly to the five rubric components.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified each section heading directly maps to one rubric component with its mark allocation. I wrote all section content independently based on my experimental results.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Generate the LaTeX template for IEEE two-column format with proper packages.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write a LaTeX preamble for a two-column IEEE-style conference paper using the article class with 1-inch margins, 10pt Times font, and proper titlesec formatting for Roman numeral section headers and italic subsection headers.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided the base LaTeX preamble with titlesec, fancyhdr, times, and geometry packages.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I compiled the template and verified the output visually matches IEEE format. I adjusted margin sizes, column separation, and section spacing to match the 4-page constraint.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Adjusted geometry margins to [margin=1in, top=0.75in] and changed columnsep to 0.25in. Removed the multicol package conflict and adjusted titlespacing to fit all content within 4 pages.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Check that the paper summary paragraph is self-contained and in my own words.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Review this paragraph summarizing the Naim 2012 DAAEM paper and tell me if it contains any phrases that are too close to the original abstract or if there are generic parts that don't reflect the specific paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Pointed out one phrase that was too generic (mentioning 'flat likelihood surface' without citing the Hessian condition number) which I revised.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I rewrote the flagged sentence to explicitly reference the condition number of the projected Hessian and the Ma et al. 2000 convergence bound, which are specific to this paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Verify the IEEE reference format for all seven citations.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Format these seven references in IEEE citation style for a conference paper: Naim 2012 ICML, Dempster 1977 JRSS-B, Xu 1996 Neural Computation, Ma 2000 Neural Computation, Ueda 1998 Neural Networks, Salakhutdinov 2003 ICML, Blei 2006 Bayesian Analysis.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided correctly formatted IEEE references with proper journal/conference abbreviations.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified each reference against the actual papers: author order, volume/page numbers, and publication years were cross-checked with the reference list in the original DAAEM paper.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page IEEE-format report for a machine learning reproduction study. The report must cover: paper summary, reproduction setup and gap analysis, two ablation findings and what they reveal, failure mode and explanation, and a reflection. What section structure maximizes clarity and rubric coverage?
top_5_prompts.why_important: The report structure directly determines whether all five rubric components (each worth 3 marks) are clearly addressed.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Write a LaTeX preamble for a two-column IEEE-style conference paper using the article class with 1-inch margins, 10pt Times font, and proper titlesec formatting for Roman numeral section headers and italic subsection headers.
top_5_prompts.why_important: The LaTeX template required multiple package configurations; having a working base saved significant debugging time.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Format these seven references in IEEE citation style for a conference paper: Naim 2012 ICML, Dempster 1977 JRSS-B, Xu 1996 Neural Computation, Ma 2000 Neural Computation, Ueda 1998 Neural Networks, Salakhutdinov 2003 ICML, Blei 2006 Bayesian Analysis.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Correct IEEE citation format was necessary to meet the professional formatting standard required by the task.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Review this paragraph summarizing the Naim 2012 DAAEM paper and tell me if it contains any phrases that are too close to the original abstract or if there are generic parts that don't reflect the specific paper.
top_5_prompts.why_important: The rubric specifies the summary must be in the student's own words; this review helped identify and fix one overly generic sentence.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.1 of Part B.
